NOTES: *All students must complete two Distributive Studies (DSxx) courses that are also approved as Big Question (SCIS) courses. Students must also fulfill two Understanding Plural Societies (DVUP) courses or one Understanding Plural Societies (DVUP) course and one Cultural Competence (DVCC) course with courses from Distributive Studies (DSxx).
